Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger

Class SaveModifiedCopyActionFX

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.SaveModifiedCopyActionFX
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent>
public class SaveModifiedCopyActionFX extends Object implements javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent>
JavaFX equivalent of the Swing SaveModifiedCopyAction. Saves the edited XLSM workbook to a user-chosen location. Relies on ExcelDataWriter.writeModifiedCopy(File, File, String, javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel) for the actual export, using data from the plugin's PageViewerPanel.

  • Constructor Details

    • SaveModifiedCopyActionFX

      public SaveModifiedCopyActionFX(javafx.stage.Stage owner, SCALedgerPlugin plugin)
      Constructs a new SaveModifiedCopyActionFX.
      Parameters:
      owner - The owner Stage for the FileChooser dialog. Must not be null.
      plugin - The SCALedgerPlugin instance providing context, such as the input file and the data model to be saved. Must not be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if owner or plugin is null (though not explicitly checked here, they are later used and would cause NPE if null).

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public void handle(javafx.event.ActionEvent e)

      Handles the action event, typically from a menu item, to save a modified copy of an XLSM workbook. The process involves:

      1. Checking if the associated SCALedgerPlugin and its current input file are available. Shows an error alert if not.
      2. Displaying a FileChooser to the user to select a destination file path for the modified copy. The initial filename suggests "modified-[original_filename].xlsm". The initial directory is based on preferences.
      3. If a destination file is selected:
        • Retrieves the PageViewerPanel and its DefaultTableModel from the plugin. Shows an error if the panel or model is unavailable.
        • Calls ExcelDataWriter.writeModifiedCopy(File, File, String, javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel) to write the data from the table model to the selected output file, using the original input file as a template. The sheet name "Sheet1" is used by default.
        • Shows an information alert upon successful save, or an error alert if an exception occurs.
        • Updates the last used directory preference.
      4. If file selection is cancelled, the method returns without further action.

      Specified by:
      handle in interface javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent>
      Parameters:
      e - The ActionEvent that triggered this handler.
